name: ImprovWiFi
description: Improv WiFi serial provisioning protocol. Vendored copy of jnthas/Improv-WiFi-Library 0.0.2 (MIT). Vendored because the registry package declares 'depends=WiFi', which makes PlatformIO install arduino-libraries/WiFi (Arduino WiFi shield library) into libdeps, shadowing the ESP32 core WiFi library and breaking the build.
